description: Triggers when user needs to install, configure, use, or theme shadcn/ui components
should_trigger: Add a Button component using shadcn/ui
How do I install shadcn in my Next.js project?
Configure dark mode theming for shadcn components
Use the shadcn Dialog component for a modal
Customize shadcn colors with CSS variables
Search for a form component in the shadcn registry
Set up shadcn MCP server for component search
should_not_trigger: Style a button with plain Tailwind CSS
Use Radix UI directly without shadcn
Setup Material UI in my project
